name: Logan Ozment
school: School of Informatics, Computing, and Cyber Systems
focus: Remote sensing • Data analysis • Research support
bio: Logan Ozment is a Graduate Research Assistant in the School of Informatics, Computing, and Cyber Systems at Northern Arizona University and is also affiliated with the Radiant Center. His work supports interdisciplinary research, data-driven analysis, and collaborative projects across remote sensing and related applied science efforts.
